text.title: GDPR DSAR Runbook — Product Dev Team Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying gdpr-dsar-runbook-product-dev-team must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: delivered_at - intake_at > 30 days without lawful extension.
Any system in data map missing from systems_queried list.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
